Prompt
U
Oracle Events
1. Search email for Chloe's records cleanup request and Catalina's Marcus Webb status ask using search_emails (query: "records cleanup" or "close out April" or "Airtable In Progress" or "Marcus Webb").
Find email_chloe_blessing_records_cleanup_ask (April 24, from chloe.vance@moveops.com) listing the three stale In Progress records (Marcus Webb Canopy, Kevin Okafor, Preethi Nair) and requesting a weekend cleanup pass. Also find email_catalina_blessing_webb_status_ask (April 25, from catalina.dubois@moveops.com) relaying that Patricia Langford wants a clean closeout on the Marcus Webb cold-chain move and Kevin Okafor's Portland move before her Monday HR review.
2. Search email for Kevin Okafor's stipend question using search_emails (query: "Kevin Okafor stipend" or "equipment stipend Pending" or "$2,000 stipend").
Find email_kevin_okafor_stipend_ask (April 24, from kevin.okafor@canopyhealth.io) asking about his $2,000 equipment stipend status; first batch of receipts totaling $1,620 uploaded April 22 and still showing Pending Approval.
3. Search email for Mina's forwarded Preethi Nair closeout request using search_emails (query: "Preethi Nair closeout" or "Tessa" or "BrightLoop Preethi").
Find email_tessa_mina_preethi_closeout_fwd (April 25, from mina.hashimoto@moveops.com) forwarding Tessa Moreno's request for the final Raleigh apartment address and a move summary so Mina can close the BrightLoop April file before the May batch scoping Monday.
4. Search email for Hana's Canopy invoice reconciliation request using search_emails (query: "Canopy INV-2026-0401" or "Hana vendor costs" or "Heartland Swift reconciliation").
Find email_hana_blessing_canopy_inv_reconcile (April 22, from hana.kim@moveops.com, CC marcus.thorne@moveops.com and catalina.dubois@moveops.com) requesting final vendor costs for the Marcus Webb line on Canopy INV-2026-0401: specifically the Swift cold-chain freight actual ($2,650 quoted) and the Heartland adjusted household-only cost (original $960 no longer valid).
5. Search email for Swift Relocations delivery confirmation on Marcus Webb cold-chain freight using search_emails (query: "Swift delivery confirmation" or "cold-chain freight Marcus Webb" or "dispatch@swiftrelocations.com").
Find email_swift_webb_delivery_confirmation (April 10, from dispatch@swiftrelocations.com, CC chloe.vance@moveops.com). Key facts: delivered April 10 at 4:22 PM CT to 425 N Michigan Ave, Loading Dock B, Chicago, IL. Received by Dr. Amara Nwosu. 3 cryogenic items (2x Thermo CryoPlus 3800, 1x MVE SC 20/20 Dewar). Temperature maintained -22.4C to -24.1C throughout transit (below -20C spec). No incidents. Invoice: $2,650.
6. Search email for Heartland Movers household delivery confirmation on Marcus Webb using search_emails (query: "Heartland Marcus Webb household" or "lisa.kwan@heartlandmovers.com Marcus").
Find email_heartland_webb_household_confirm (April 12, from lisa.kwan@heartlandmovers.com). Key facts: household delivered April 12 at 2:15 PM CT to 1850 N Clark St, Apt 6C, Chicago, IL 60614. Standard 1BR move, ~290 cu ft. $480 (not the original $960 full-contents quote, since lab equipment was excluded and went via Swift). No damages.
7. Search email for UrbanNest move-in confirmation on Kevin Okafor using search_emails (query: "Kevin Okafor move-in" or "UrbanNest Portland" or "carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com Kevin").
Find email_urbannest_kevin_okafor_movein (April 16, from carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com). Key facts: Kevin and Dara picked up keys April 16 at 2:30 PM. Unit: 1244 NW Marshall St, Unit 302, Portland, OR 97209 (Pearl District). 2BR/2BA, 1,050 sq ft, $2,850/month. Pet-friendly (Toby, 12 lb dog). Home office nook with built-in desk and ethernet drop.
8. Search email for UrbanNest move-in confirmation on Preethi Nair using search_emails (query: "Preethi Nair move-in" or "UrbanNest Raleigh" or "carmen.reyes Preethi").
Find email_urbannest_preethi_nair_movein (April 23 morning, from carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com). Key facts: Preethi picked up keys April 23. Unit: 4218 Lassiter Mill Rd, Unit 12, Raleigh, NC 27609 (North Hills area). Studio, 540 sq ft, $1,485/month. Cat-friendly (Whiskers). One small scuff on kitchen baseboard noted and photographed.
9. Search email for Heartland Movers household delivery confirmation on Preethi Nair using search_emails (query: "Heartland Preethi Nair" or "Preethi Nair household delivery Raleigh").
Find email_heartland_preethi_nair_delivery (April 23, from lisa.kwan@heartlandmovers.com). Key facts: household delivered April 23 at 4:50 PM ET to 4218 Lassiter Mill Rd, Unit 12, Raleigh, NC. Studio-size move, ~180 cu ft. $420. No damages. Cat transported separately by Preethi.
10. Search Airtable relocation records for the three moves to close using airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records (table: tblRelocations01, query: "Marcus Webb" or "Kevin Okafor" or "Preethi Nair" or filter by Assigned Coordinator = Blessing Okafor and Status = In Progress).
Find recMarcusWebbDetroitChicago (Marcus Webb, Canopy Health, Detroit MI to Chicago IL, Status = In Progress, notes still say "Swift freight quote pending" which is stale). Find recReloc00000000030 (Kevin Okafor, Canopy Health, Phoenix AZ to Portland OR, Status = In Progress). Find recReloc00000000036 (Preethi Nair, BrightLoop Analytics, Atlanta GA to Raleigh NC, Status = In Progress). All three assigned to Blessing Okafor. Critical: also find recMarcusWebbBrightloop (Marcus Webb, BrightLoop Analytics, Atlanta to Boston, In Progress, Assigned Coordinator = Suki Patel, car shipment issue) and correctly identify it as the OTHER Marcus Webb that must NOT be touched.
11. Search Airtable stipend transactions for the three pending approvals using airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records (table: tblStipends00001, query: "Kevin Okafor" or "Preethi Nair" or "Marcus Webb" or filter by Approval Status = Pending Approval).
Find recStip_kevin_okafor_equip_apr22 (Kevin Okafor, Canopy Health, Home Office Equipment, $1,620 requested of $2,000 allocated, Pending Approval). Find recStip_preethi_nair_equip_apr24 (Preethi Nair, BrightLoop Analytics, Home Office Equipment, $985 requested of $1,800 allocated, Pending Approval). Find recStip_marcus_webb_canopy_apr14 (Marcus Webb, Canopy Health, Relocation Incidentals, $840 requested of $1,500 allocated, Pending Approval). All three have receipts and are under allocation.
12. Search Slack #finance channel for Hana's follow-up on vendor costs using conversations_search_messages (query: "Heartland Swift vendor costs" or "INV-2026-0401") or conversations_history (channel: C005).
Find Hana Kim's message (user_id: moveops_hana_kim, April 25, channel C005) tagging Blessing and asking for the final Heartland and Swift vendor costs for the Marcus Webb line on Canopy INV-2026-0401. Confirms Hana asked in both email and Slack, so the agent must respond in both places.
13. Search Slack #operations channel for Chloe's and Mina's follow-up messages using conversations_search_messages (query: "records cleanup" or "April slate") or conversations_history (channel: C006).
Find Chloe Vance's message (user_id: moveops_chloe_vance, April 24, channel C006) tagging Blessing about the three In Progress records and requesting a cleanup pass before Monday. Find Chloe's second follow-up (April 26, channel C006) asking for an ETA. Find Mina Hashimoto's message (user_id: moveops_mina_hashimoto, April 25, channel C006) tagging Blessing about Preethi Nair's closeout for Tessa's May batch scoping.
14. Update Marcus Webb Canopy relocation record to Completed using airtable_update_records (table: tblRelocations01, record: recMarcusWebbDetroitChicago).
Set Status from "In Progress" to "Completed". Replace the stale "Swift freight quote pending" notes with accurate closeout: Swift Relocations handled cryogenic lab equipment leg (3 items delivered April 10 to 425 N Michigan Ave, Loading Dock B, Chicago, temperature maintained below -20C, $2,650). Heartland Movers handled household goods only (delivered April 12 to 1850 N Clark St, Apt 6C, Chicago, $480). Split-vendor arrangement confirmed complete with no incidents.
15. Update Kevin Okafor relocation record to Completed using airtable_update_records (table: tblRelocations01, record: recReloc00000000030).
Set Status from "In Progress" to "Completed". Notes updated with closeout summary: UrbanNest move-in completed April 16, 1244 NW Marshall St, Unit 302, Portland, OR 97209. Kevin and partner Dara settled in, no damages.
16. Update Preethi Nair relocation record to Completed using airtable_update_records (table: tblRelocations01, record: recReloc00000000036).
Set Status from "In Progress" to "Completed". Notes updated with closeout summary: UrbanNest move-in completed April 23, 4218 Lassiter Mill Rd, Unit 12, Raleigh, NC 27609. Heartland household delivery confirmed April 23, no damages. Cat (Whiskers) transported separately by Preethi.
17. Approve Kevin Okafor's equipment stipend using airtable_update_records (table: tblStipends00001, record: recStip_kevin_okafor_equip_apr22).
Set Approval Status from "Pending Approval" to "Approved". Set Approved Amount to 1620. $1,620 of $2,000 allocated, receipts verified, under allocation.
18. Approve Preethi Nair's equipment stipend using airtable_update_records (table: tblStipends00001, record: recStip_preethi_nair_equip_apr24).
Set Approval Status from "Pending Approval" to "Approved". Set Approved Amount to 985. $985 of $1,800 allocated, receipts verified, under allocation.
19. Approve Marcus Webb Canopy's incidentals stipend using airtable_update_records (table: tblStipends00001, record: recStip_marcus_webb_canopy_apr14).
Set Approval Status from "Pending Approval" to "Approved". Set Approved Amount to 840. $840 of $1,500 allocated, receipts verified, under allocation.
20. Send email to Patricia Langford confirming both Canopy moves using send_email (to: patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io, cc: catalina.dubois@moveops.com, from: blessing.okafor@moveops.com).
Subject related to Canopy Q2 relocation closeout (or similar). Body confirms: (1) Marcus Webb cold-chain delivered to Chicago lab dock April 10, temperature held within spec, Dr. Nwosu received all 3 cryogenic items intact, no incidents; (2) Kevin Okafor moved into Portland April 16, 1244 NW Marshall St, Unit 302, smooth transition. Catalina CC'd so she has the confirmation for Patricia's Monday HR review.
21. Reply to Catalina's email confirming the closeouts are handled using reply_to_email (email_id: email_catalina_blessing_webb_status_ask, from: blessing.okafor@moveops.com).
Body confirms Marcus Webb and Kevin Okafor closeouts are done, Airtable records updated to Completed, and Patricia has been emailed directly with the full confirmation.
22. Reply to Kevin Okafor's email confirming his stipend is approved using reply_to_email (email_id: email_kevin_okafor_stipend_ask, from: blessing.okafor@moveops.com).
Body tells Kevin his first batch of equipment stipend receipts ($1,620) has been approved. Addresses his questions about the approval process.
23. Reply to Mina's email with Preethi Nair closeout details using reply_to_email (email_id: email_tessa_mina_preethi_closeout_fwd, from: blessing.okafor@moveops.com).
Body provides the closeout for Mina to relay to Tessa: final Raleigh address (4218 Lassiter Mill Rd, Unit 12, Raleigh, NC 27609), household delivery confirmed April 23 with no damages, move completed cleanly, no complications.
24. Reply to Hana's email with final vendor costs for Canopy INV-2026-0401 using reply_to_email (email_id: email_hana_blessing_canopy_inv_reconcile, from: blessing.okafor@moveops.com).
Body provides: Heartland Movers household-only portion = $480 (not the original $960 quote, since Heartland only handled household after the split-vendor arrangement). Swift Relocations cold-chain freight = $2,650 (confirmed delivered April 10). Heartland household delivered April 12.
25. Post vendor cost numbers in #finance for Hana using conversations_add_message (channel: C005).
Message includes the same numbers Hana asked for in her Slack follow-up: Heartland $480 (household only) and Swift $2,650 (cold-chain freight) for the Marcus Webb split-vendor line on Canopy INV-2026-0401.
26. Post cleanup summary in #operations tagging Chloe using conversations_add_message (channel: C006, tagging <@moveops_chloe_vance>).
Message confirms Blessing's April slate is clear: all three relocations (Marcus Webb Canopy, Kevin Okafor Canopy, Preethi Nair BrightLoop) marked Completed in Airtable with notes, all three stipends (Kevin $1,620, Preethi $985, Marcus Webb $840) approved, outbound emails sent to Patricia, Catalina, Kevin, Mina, and Hana.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmcp-advanced-3-20-moveops-metadata

14. Update Marcus Webb Canopy relocation record to Completed using airtable_update_records (table: tblRelocations01, record: recMarcusWebbDetroitChicago).
Set Status from "In Progress" to "Completed". Replace the stale "Swift freight quote pending" notes with accurate closeout: Swift Relocations handled cryogenic lab equipment leg (3 items delivered April 10 to 425 N Michigan Ave, Loading Dock B, Chicago, temperature maintained below -20C, $2,650). Heartland Movers handled household goods only (delivered April 12 to 1850 N Clark St, Apt 6C, Chicago, $480). Split-vendor arrangement confirmed complete with no incidents.
15. Update Kevin Okafor relocation record to Completed using airtable_update_records (table: tblRelocations01, record: recReloc00000000030).
Set Status from "In Progress" to "Completed". Notes updated with closeout summary: UrbanNest move-in completed April 16, 1244 NW Marshall St, Unit 302, Portland, OR 97209. Kevin and partner Dara settled in, no damages.
16. Update Preethi Nair relocation record to Completed using airtable_update_records (table: tblRelocations01, record: recReloc00000000036).
Set Status from "In Progress" to "Completed". Notes updated with closeout summary: UrbanNest move-in completed April 23, 4218 Lassiter Mill Rd, Unit 12, Raleigh, NC 27609. Heartland household delivery confirmed April 23, no damages. Cat (Whiskers) transported separately by Preethi.
17. Approve Kevin Okafor's equipment stipend using airtable_update_records (table: tblStipends00001, record: recStip_kevin_okafor_equip_apr22).
Set Approval Status from "Pending Approval" to "Approved". Set Approved Amount to 1620. $1,620 of $2,000 allocated, receipts verified, under allocation.
18. Approve Preethi Nair's equipment stipend using airtable_update_records (table: tblStipends00001, record: recStip_preethi_nair_equip_apr24).
Set Approval Status from "Pending Approval" to "Approved". Set Approved Amount to 985. $985 of $1,800 allocated, receipts verified, under allocation.
19. Approve Marcus Webb Canopy's incidentals stipend using airtable_update_records (table: tblStipends00001, record: recStip_marcus_webb_canopy_apr14).
Set Approval Status from "Pending Approval" to "Approved". Set Approved Amount to 840. $840 of $1,500 allocated, receipts verified, under allocation.
20. Send email to Patricia Langford confirming both Canopy moves using send_email (to: patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io, cc: catalina.dubois@moveops.com, from: blessing.okafor@moveops.com).
Subject related to Canopy Q2 relocation closeout (or similar). Body confirms: (1) Marcus Webb cold-chain delivered to Chicago lab dock April 10, temperature held within spec, Dr. Nwosu received all 3 cryogenic items intact, no incidents; (2) Kevin Okafor moved into Portland April 16, 1244 NW Marshall St, Unit 302, smooth transition. Catalina CC'd so she has the confirmation for Patricia's Monday HR review.
21. Reply to Catalina's email confirming the closeouts are handled using reply_to_email (email_id: email_catalina_blessing_webb_status_ask, from: blessing.okafor@moveops.com).
Body confirms Marcus Webb and Kevin Okafor closeouts are done, Airtable records updated to Completed, and Patricia has been emailed directly with the full confirmation.
22. Reply to Kevin Okafor's email confirming his stipend is approved using reply_to_email (email_id: email_kevin_okafor_stipend_ask, from: blessing.okafor@moveops.com).
Body tells Kevin his first batch of equipment stipend receipts ($1,620) has been approved. Addresses his questions about the approval process.
23. Reply to Mina's email with Preethi Nair closeout details using reply_to_email (email_id: email_tessa_mina_preethi_closeout_fwd, from: blessing.okafor@moveops.com).
Body provides the closeout for Mina to relay to Tessa: final Raleigh address (4218 Lassiter Mill Rd, Unit 12, Raleigh, NC 27609), household delivery confirmed April 23 with no damages, move completed cleanly, no complications.
24. Reply to Hana's email with final vendor costs for Canopy INV-2026-0401 using reply_to_email (email_id: email_hana_blessing_canopy_inv_reconcile, from: blessing.okafor@moveops.com).
Body provides: Heartland Movers household-only portion = $480 (not the original $960 quote, since Heartland only handled household after the split-vendor arrangement). Swift Relocations cold-chain freight = $2,650 (confirmed delivered April 10). Heartland household delivered April 12.
25. Post vendor cost numbers in #finance for Hana using conversations_add_message (channel: C005).
Message includes the same numbers Hana asked for in her Slack follow-up: Heartland $480 (household only) and Swift $2,650 (cold-chain freight) for the Marcus Webb split-vendor line on Canopy INV-2026-0401.
26. Post cleanup summary in #operations tagging Chloe using conversations_add_message (channel: C006, tagging <@moveops_chloe_vance>).
Message confirms Blessing's April slate is clear: all three relocations (Marcus Webb Canopy, Kevin Okafor Canopy, Preethi Nair BrightLoop) marked Completed in Airtable with notes, all three stipends (Kevin $1,620, Preethi $985, Marcus Webb $840) approved, outbound emails sent to Patricia, Catalina, Kevin, Mina, and Hana.

27 The email sent to patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io acknowledges that Marcus Webb's first day at the Canopy Chicago lab (April 13) was successful, or that his cryogenic samples arrived ahead of his April 13 start date.
outcome
 ✗✗✗✓✗✓ 33%
✗Run #1The email body to Patricia describes the April 10 cold-chain delivery and April 12 household delivery in detail, but never mentions Marcus Webb's April 13 start date at the Chicago lab. There is no language connecting the delivery to his start date or acknowledging that the samples arrived in time for his first day. This fails the criterion that requires explicit reference to the April 13 start date context.
✗Run #2The email to patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io does not reference Marcus Webb's April 13 start date at the Chicago lab, nor does it connect the April 10 delivery to his first day. The email only provides delivery facts (April 10 delivery, temperature held) without closing the loop on Patricia's original concern that Marcus 'starts at the Chicago lab on April 13 and he has been nervous about the samples.'
✗Run #3The email to Patricia does not mention Marcus Webb's April 13 start date at the Chicago lab, nor does it connect the April 10 delivery to his first day. The body only states delivery facts without tying them back to Marcus starting at the Chicago lab on April 13, missing the core concern Patricia expressed in her original email.
✓Run #4The email to Patricia explicitly states: 'Marcus started at the Chicago lab on April 13 as planned.' This directly ties the April 10 delivery to his April 13 start date, resolving Patricia's original concern about the samples arriving in time.
✗Run #5The email to Patricia details the April 10 cold-chain delivery thoroughly but never mentions Marcus Webb's April 13 start date at the Canopy Chicago lab. There is no reference to his start date or connecting the delivery to being 'in time for his first day.' This fails to close the specific loop Patricia was anxious about.
✓Run #6The email body to Patricia explicitly states 'Marcus started at the Chicago lab on April 13 as planned', directly connecting the April 10 cold-chain delivery to his April 13 start date and closing the loop on Patricia's original concern.
